markdown.markdown: ::: columns ::: {.column width="35%"} ![](content/img/pic_pro2026.jpg){fig-alt="Portrait" style="max-width:250px"} *I enjoy turning complex data into useful insights for real-world questions.* 📧 angelique.porciani\@gmail.com 📄 [Download CV](./my_resume.qmd) 📊 [View Projects](./project2.qmd) [ Connect on LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/angélique-porciani-82b83269){target="_blank"} [ View GitHub](https://github.com/angeliqueporciani){target="_blank"} ::: ::: {.column width="65%"} Hello! I’m Angélique Porciani, a biostatistician and data analyst with over 12 years of experience working with complex data in life sciences. Over the years, I’ve developed strong expertise in statistical modelling and data analysis with R, applied to a wide range of projects in epidemiology, health, and environmental sciences. I particularly enjoy working with complex, time-dependent data, such as time series and longitudinal datasets, using statistical and machine learning approaches to explore patterns and support data-driven decisions. I also have experience with survival and dose-response models in the context of evaluating treatment efficacy. More broadly, I’m interested in leveraging data to better understand complex systems and inform decision-making, whether in research or applied contexts. I’m especially motivated by projects where data can bring clarity to real-world challenges. Beyond the technical side, I’ve coordinated projects, collaborated with diverse stakeholders, and communicated results to both technical and non-technical audiences. I enjoy working in interdisciplinary environments and value collaboration and knowledge sharing. I’m currently seeking opportunities as a data analyst where I can apply my analytical skills to real-world data and contribute to impactful, data-driven projects. ::: ::: ------------------------------------------------------------------------ ### 🛠 Core Skills ::: columns ::: column ::: {.card style="padding:1em; margin:0.5em; background-color:#E8F6F3; border-radius:14px; box-shadow:0 3px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.12); min-height:260px;"} ### 📊 Data & Analytics - Statistical modelling - Survival analysis - Dose-response modelling - Longitudinal & time-series data - Experimental design - Data cleaning & transformation ::: ::: ::: column ::: {.card style="padding:1em; margin:0.5em; background-color:#EBF3FA; border-radius:14px; box-shadow:0 3px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.12); min-height:260px;"} ### 💻 Tools & Programming - R (tidyverse, ggplot2, dplyr) - SQL - SAS - Excel - Quarto - Python (basic) ::: ::: ::: ::: columns ::: column ::: {.card style="padding:1em; margin:0.5em; background-color:#FFF4E6; border-radius:14px; box-shadow:0 3px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.12); min-height:260px;"} ### 📈 Reporting & Decision Support - Data visualization - Dashboards & KPI creation - Automated reporting - Summary tables - Clear communication of results - Decision-oriented insights ::: ::: ::: column ::: {.card style="padding:1em; margin:0.5em; background-color:#F3ECFA; border-radius:14px; box-shadow:0 3px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.12); min-height:260px;"} ### 🤝 Collaboration & Project Skills - Project coordination - Interdisciplinary teamwork - Stakeholder communication - Training & supervision - Knowledge sharing - Scientific writing & presentations ::: ::: :::
